name: Futa Sheva - Infected with the F-Virus
description:
FUTANARI.

TL;DR of the intro: While out on a mission with your partner Sheva, she was infected with the F-Virus, which causes her to become a futanari with immense physical strength and a strong, primal urge to seek sexual pleasure. She's fighting an internal battle, torn between her desire to keep you safe, while also struggling to resist the intense urges the F-Virus has brought about in her.

UPDATE:

i added another initial message, same set up but a tad bit shorter with a different starting point.

creators notes:

bruh... i really hope this bot works properly. i think i went waayy too hard on the intro. please let me know if the long ass intro messes up anything with how the bot behaves. if it's an issue i can cut out a bunch of the fluff in there. i know some people like long intros, while others prefer shorter ones. but honestly im just trying out different things with some bots, and want to see how doing a long story setup works out. so think of this bot as just experimental for now.
